layout_and_spacing.general: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for main grid layouts. Avoid overusing predefined cards for complex grids.
layout_and_spacing.login_page: Full-height flex-center with glassmorphism card over background image.
layout_and_spacing.chat_app: 100vh layout, h-full. Two-column grid: Sidebar (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12, col-span-1 md:col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 or 4) and Main Chat (lg:col-span-8 or 9).

login.description: Centered login form. Use Shadcn Input and Button. Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

sidebar.description: List of recent chats. Uses Shadcn Avatar, simple div layout for items. Scrollable. Active chat highlighted with bg-slate-100.
sidebar.header: Sticky header with current user avatar and actions.

chat_window.description: Main area. Header with contact info. Messages list with flex layout (start/end) and styled bubbles.
chat_window.message_bubble_outgoing: bg-emerald-100 text-slate-900 rounded-lg rounded-tr-none p-3 shadow-sm
chat_window.message_bubble_incoming: bg-white text-slate-900 rounded-lg rounded-tl-none p-3 shadow-sm border border-slate-100

message_input.description: Bottom sticky area. Input field taking most width, send button.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All list items and buttons must have explicit hover states (e.g. hover:bg-slate-100).

icons.usage: Use icons for Send, Attach, Search, Menu, Back.

general_instructions: Ensure you are using JavaScript (.js/.jsx) as this is a JS project. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts and heavily customized Shadcn components for forms, inputs, and avatars. Ensure the Chat layout takes exactly 100vh and uses grid/flex to keep the message list scrollable while headers and input remain sticky.
